source: Example only. Copy to release/secrets-proof.local.json or run release:secrets-proof from an approved secret store context. Never paste secret values.

DATABASE_URL.note: Record name/store presence only; do not store the connection string.

STAGING_DATABASE_URL.note: Record name/store presence only; do not store the connection string.

NEON_API_KEY.note: Record key-name presence only; do not store the token.

NEON_PROJECT_ID.note: Record project-id presence only when it matches salary-hijacking.

CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.note: Record token-name presence only; do not store the token.

CF_ADMIN_WORKER_NAME.note: Record the configured secret/setting name only.

EXPO_TOKEN.note: Record token-name presence only; do not store the token.

GITHUB_TOKEN.note: GitHub Actions runtime token presence can be recorded without storing the token.

GITHUB_REPOSITORY.note: Record repository name presence only; expected value is jinbizman-boop/salary-hijacking.

SENTRY_DSN.note: Record DSN-name presence only; do not store the DSN.

SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL.note: Record webhook-name presence only; do not store the webhook URL.

note: This template intentionally records false verification by default. It must never contain raw database URLs, API tokens, DSNs, webhooks, private keys, passwords, service accounts, or user/financial payloads.
